headline: KLA Corporation, Monolithic Power Systems, onsemi, Semtech, and Lattice Semiconductor Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the U.S.-China summit concluded without any significant breakthroughs on semiconductor sales to the country.
